none.$description: No rounding. Data tables, code blocks, dividers.

xs.$description: Barely-there rounding. Tight chips, input borders.

sm.$description: Small. Badges, tags, tooltips, inline elements.

md.$description: Default component. Buttons, inputs, selects, dropdowns.

xl.$description: Large cards, bottom sheets, side drawers.

3xl.$description: Large modals, onboarding screens, splash cards.

pill.$description: Full pill. Toggle chips, status badges, rounded CTAs.

circle.$description: Perfect circle. Avatars, icon buttons, dot indicators.
